stub: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background.
constituency: She is from a constituency that is not your constituency.
personalization: She frequently speaks out and votes against her party leadership.
substantive: She opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
text: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white working class background. She is from a constituency that is not your constituency. She frequently speaks out and votes against her party leadership. She opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, she regularly explains how her policies matter to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
